---
title: "DDX41_CpG_island_main_hits_TFs"
author: "charvi khanna"
date: "2026-05-20"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r}
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))

install.packages("rmarkdown")
install.packages("knitr")
install.packages("tinytex")
BiocManager::install("TFBSTools")
BiocManager::install("Biostrings")
BiocManager::install("JASPAR2022")

library(rmarkdown)
library(knitr)
library(tinytex)
library(TFBSTools)
library(Biostrings)
library(JASPAR2022)

ddx41_promoter <- DNAString("")

ddx41_promoter

subseq_48_522_ddx41 <- subseq(ddx41_promoter, start = 48, end = 522)
subseq_48_522_ddx41

opts <- list(species = 9606)
motifs <- getMatrixSet(JASPAR2022, opts)
pwm <- toPWM(motifs)

hits_subseq_ddx41 <- searchSeq(pwm, subseq_48_522_ddx41, seqname = "subseq_48_522_ddx41", min.score = "95%")
hits_subseq_ddx41

hits_ddx41_subseq_filtered_1 <- hits_subseq_ddx41[sapply(hits_subseq_ddx41, length) > 0]
hits_ddx41_subseq_filtered_1


hits_df_ddx41 <- as(hits_ddx41_subseq_filtered_1, "data.frame")
hits_df_ddx41
```
